name: Village of Oakhaven
description: A peaceful medieval village nestled in a valley.

village_center.name: Village Square
village_center.description: The heart of the village. A weathered stone fountain stands in the center, and villagers go about their daily business.
village_center.discovery_text: You enter the village square. A fountain gurgles at its center.
village_center.ambient_text: Villagers chat quietly by the fountain.

blacksmith.name: Blacksmith Shop
blacksmith.description: The ring of hammer on anvil echoes from this sturdy stone building. Weapons and tools line the walls.
blacksmith.discovery_text: Heat washes over you as you step into the smithy.
blacksmith.ambient_text: Sparks fly as hammer strikes steel.

tavern.name: The Rusty Tankard Tavern
tavern.description: Warm light spills from the windows. The smell of ale and hearty stew fills the air. A rugged hunter sits in the corner, cleaning his gear.
tavern.discovery_text: The tavern door swings open, releasing a wave of warmth and laughter.
tavern.ambient_text: A fire crackles in the hearth. A hunter sharpens his knife in the corner.

market.name: Marketplace
market.description: Colorful tents and stalls crowd the marketplace. Merchants call out to passersby.
market.ambient_text: A merchant haggles loudly over spices.

gate_exit.name: Oakhaven Gates Exit
gate_exit.description: Just inside the massive gates of Oakhaven, looking out to the forest.
gate_exit.discovery_text: The village gates stand open, leading to the wild beyond.
gate_exit.ambient_text: A guard leans against the gatepost.

church.name: Church of the Divine Light
church.description: A serene stone church with stained glass windows depicting holy symbols. The air smells of incense and peace. An elderly archmage studies ancient tomes in a corner alcove.
church.discovery_text: You step into the quiet sanctuary. Sunlight streams through stained glass.
church.ambient_text: Soft chanting echoes from the choir loft. An archmage mutters arcane formulas nearby.

graveyard.name: Village Graveyard
graveyard.description: A peaceful graveyard with weathered tombstones and blooming wildflowers. The church stands to the north.
graveyard.discovery_text: You enter the quiet graveyard. The air is still and peaceful.
graveyard.ambient_text: A gentle breeze rustles the leaves of the old oak tree.

adventure_guild.name: Adventure Guild Hall
adventure_guild.description: A sturdy wooden building with a prominent sign bearing a sword and shield. Inside, a large bulletin board displays various quests. A tall woman in leather armor practices sword forms in the corner.
adventure_guild.discovery_text: You push open the heavy oak door of the guild hall. The smell of parchment and adventure fills the air.
adventure_guild.ambient_text: Adventurers mill about, discussing their latest exploits. A swordswoman practices her forms nearby.

arcane_tower.name: Arcane Tower
arcane_tower.description: A tall, cylindrical tower of polished white stone that seems to shimmer with magical energy. Arcane symbols are carved into the walls, and a soft blue light glows from the windows. The air crackles with raw magical power.
arcane_tower.discovery_text: You stand before the Arcane Tower, feeling the magical energy thrumming through the stone. The heavy oak door stands slightly ajar.
arcane_tower.ambient_text: Arcane energy hums in the air. You can hear the distant sound of pages turning and arcane formulas being recited.
